Alpha-Fetoprotein (AFP) Test 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/alpha-fetoprotein-afp-test/ 
Alpha-Fetoprotein (AFP) Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an alpha-fetoprotein (AFP) test? 
An AFP test is a blood test that measures the level of alpha-fetoprotein (AFP) in your blood when you are pregnant. The test checks your baby's risk of having certain birth defects and genetic problems , but it does not diagnose any health conditions. The test is usually done between 15 and 20 weeks
